parameters.subject: =Interview Reminder: {{ $json.body.jobTitle }} at {{ $json.body.companyName }} tomorrow
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $json.body.candidateName }},

This is a friendly reminder that you have an upcoming AI Avatar Interview scheduled for the {{ $json.body.jobTitle }} position at {{ $json.companyName }}.

Time: {{ $json.body.schedule }}
Duration: {{ $json.body.durationMinutes }} minutes

Please ensure you are in a quiet room with a working microphone before starting.

Best regards,
The AuraRecruit Team
